Liverpool have put a pin in their pursuit of Mo Salah and begun talks with Sporting Lisbon over the signing of winger Gelson Martins, Sky Sports News HQ understands.

Sky sources reported earlier this week that, despite agreeing personal terms in principle, the Reds were struggling to agree a fee for Salah with Roma, who are holding out for £35m.

Manager Jurgen Klopp has therefore begun exploring other options and turned to Martins - a 22-year-old Portugal international whom they have scouted throughout the season.

Martins has a release clause is set at £46.5m but Sky Sports News HQ understands Sporting would be willing to sell him for just under £40m in the right circumstances.

And the Reds might decide Martins represents good value for money for a player whose prime years lie ahead of him.

Martins has been one of Sporting's key players this term, scoring six goals in 32 outings and the club are bracing themselves for interest, but they have not yet received any bids.

Manager Jurgen Klopp has therefore begun exploring other options and turned to Martins - a 22-year-old Portugal international whom they have scouted throughout the season.

Martins has a release clause is set at £46.5m but Sky Sports News HQ understands Sporting would be willing to sell him for just under £40m in the right circumstances.

And the Reds might decide Martins represents good value for money for a player whose prime years lie ahead of him.

Martins has been one of Sporting's key players this term, scoring six goals in 32 outings and the club are bracing themselves for interest, but they have not yet received any bids.

【now.com體育】謝拉特與摩連奴的「牙齒印」絕對不少，但日前謝拉特大爆料，稱摩連奴曾經多次想簽入自己。

謝拉特與摩連奴可說是「愛恨交纏」，如3年前的英超季尾重頭戲，就是由謝拉特（Steven Gerrard）帶領衝擊英超冠軍的利物浦，於主場大戰摩連奴（Jose Mourinho）帶領的車路士。比賽當中有謝拉特「大意跣腳」跣走了聯賽冠軍的希望之外，他更在球賽中多次與摩連奴發生衝突，如果說摩連奴原來想簽他會否有點妙想天開？

據英國《鏡報》報道，日前謝拉特在北愛爾蘭貝爾法斯特出席一個活動時回答球迷提問，更特選了一條關於自己與現役曼聯主帥摩連奴有關的問題，指摩連奴無論帶領甚麼球隊，都想簽入自己。謝拉特指，摩連奴執教車路士時是最接近成功簽下他的，「當中最接近成功的是2004/05年球季。在我整個足球生涯中，他嘗試過5、6次想簽我，在車路士時試過2次，在國際米蘭與皇家馬德里年代他亦嘗試過。我本來有機會為摩連奴及其球隊效力，但我沒有這樣做。」

謝拉特一直堅持留在利物浦直至2015年，之後便離隊轉職美職聯，跟隨不少其他球星的步伐加盟洛杉磯銀河。完成自己的球員生涯之後他「踢而優則教」，成為利物浦的U-18教練，一直都沒有成為摩帥麾下大將。

Liverpool midfielder Lucas Leiva wants a return to former club Gremio this summer.

The Brazilian is assessing his future options after completing 10 years at Anfield, racking up almost 350 appearances since arriving from Gremio for £5million in July 2007.

The 30-year-old has been regularly touted with leaving Liverpool in recent seasons only to remain a key member of the first-team squad.

Lucas could have returned to Gremio in January but wanted to reach a decade of service with the Reds, for which he was given a special award following the final game of the season against Middlesbrough.

Now, in an interview with Brazil's Radio Atlantica, he has expressed his desire to return to his old team – provided certain conditions are met.

“There was an offer from Gremio in January but I wanted to complete 10 years at Liverpool,” he said.

“Now in the window we had a conversation, but nothing official. I do not hide my desire to return to Gremio, but there are several factors.”

Liverpool midfielder Lucas Leiva wants a return to former club Gremio this summer.

The Brazilian is assessing his future options after completing 10 years at Anfield, racking up almost 350 appearances since arriving from Gremio for £5million in July 2007.

The 30-year-old has been regularly touted with leaving Liverpool in recent seasons only to remain a key member of the first-team squad.

Lucas could have returned to Gremio in January but wanted to reach a decade of service with the Reds, for which he was given a special award following the final game of the season against Middlesbrough.

Now, in an interview with Brazil's Radio Atlantica, he has expressed his desire to return to his old team – provided certain conditions are met.

“There was an offer from Gremio in January but I wanted to complete 10 years at Liverpool,” he said.

“Now in the window we had a conversation, but nothing official. I do not hide my desire to return to Gremio, but there are several factors.”
